title: feat: Add Adyen integration and deprecate Stripe v1 client
author: Charlie (Backend Engineer)
content:
This PR integrates the Adyen SDK for transaction handling and marks the legacy StripeClient class as @deprecated. Feature flags control traffic distribution between Stripe and Adyen.
Merged by: Bob (Lead Architect)

title: fix: resolve Adyen webhook signature verification
author: Bob (Lead Architect)
content: Fixes Adyen webhook verification by referencing the correct webhook signing token instead of the old Stripe credentials. Resolves production alert.

title: cleanup: Remove Stripe v1 codebase and database tables
author: Charlie (Backend Engineer)
content: This PR deletes all files under `/services/payments/stripe_v1`, drops the stripe_tokens database tables, and removes feature flag gates as migration to Adyen is 100% complete.
